comment: VibeID persona matrix v3. 4 axes (Mind/Craft/Arc/Flow) produce 16 codes like RTAH. Each persona PNG filename equals the 4-letter code + '.png' (e.g. RTAH.png). Image URL = image_base_url + '/' + code + '.png'. Both image_base_url fields are the same CDN URL by design — a relative path would be resolved to file:///C:/Users/<username>/... by some Claude runtimes, leaking the username and breaking shared screenshots.

RDVL.name: Deep Sage
RDVL.tagline: Contemplates the essence of code in lotus position; wisdom alone.
RDVL.tagline_cn: 盘坐冥想代码本质，独守智慧。

RDVH.name: Starborne Scholar
RDVH.tagline: Teaches a circle of apprentices; collective wisdom under the stars.
RDVH.tagline_cn: 带一众学徒在星空下共修学问。

RDAL.name: Lone Architect
RDAL.tagline: Alone on the cliff-studio, draws blueprints for monumental systems.
RDAL.tagline_cn: 悬崖工作室独自绘制宏大系统蓝图。

RDAH.name: Star Architect
RDAH.tagline: Leads design councils on holographic blueprints spanning cosmic scale.
RDAH.tagline_cn: 主持宇宙级全息蓝图的设计评审。

RTVL.name: Deep Captain
RTVL.tagline: Takes the helm alone on long night voyages; one ship, one release at a time.
RTVL.tagline_cn: 夜航独驾，一船压上一次 release。

RTVH.name: Star Admiral
RTVH.tagline: Commands multiple deep-space fleets on coordinated release campaigns.
RTVH.tagline_cn: 指挥多支深空舰队同步出击。

RTAL.name: Nightsmith
RTAL.tagline: Forges in silence under the moon; deep work, solo craft.
RTAL.tagline_cn: 月下炉火旁默默锻造，沉浸式独作。

RTAH.name: Titan Builder
RTAH.tagline: Leads an engineering crew to raise massive, durable structures.
RTAH.tagline_cn: 带工程队修筑巨型建筑，稳健耐久。

EDVL.name: Lone Scout
EDVL.tagline: Magnifier in hand, investigates the codebase alone and finds the truth.
EDVL.tagline_cn: 放大镜加地图，独自摸清代码库底细。

EDVH.name: Swarm Scout
EDVH.tagline: Fans out multiple scouts; sweeps many fronts at once.
EDVH.tagline_cn: 分身撒出斥候，同时扫描多条战线。

EDAL.name: Lone Cartograph
EDAL.tagline: Draws the map of the codebase in solitude, on weathered parchment.
EDAL.tagline_cn: 独自在孤岛绘制代码地图。

EDAH.name: Star Atlas
EDAH.tagline: Collaborative sky-mapper; teaches apprentices to chart the constellations.
EDAH.tagline_cn: 带学徒协作绘制宏大星图。

ETVL.name: Sparkblade
ETVL.tagline: Strikes down bugs in a single flash of steel, roaming as a bounty hunter.
ETVL.tagline_cn: 电光石火一刀劈碎 bug，独来独往的赏金猎人。

ETVH.name: Spark Armada
ETVH.tagline: Leads parallel strikes; ships releases like thunderstorms sweeping the grid.
ETVH.tagline_cn: 多线并行突袭，发版像雷暴扫过电网。

ETAL.name: Solo Forger
ETAL.tagline: One hammer, one anvil, one hand-crafted feature at a time.
ETAL.tagline_cn: 一锤一凿，一次一件地打磨新功能。

ETAH.name: Forge Commune
ETAH.tagline: Leads a tight workshop; new parts roll off the line in fast bursts.
ETAH.tagline_cn: 带着匠人小队，新件像流水线一样飞速出炉。
